_comment: Add custom Q&A pairs here to improve chatbot responses. These are checked FIRST before AI.

custom_responses.response:
Hello! 👋 Welcome to the NYSC AI Assistant!

I'm here to help you with everything related to the National Youth Service Corps. You can ask me about:

• 📋 Registration & Call-up Letter
• 🏕️ Orientation Camp Preparation
• 💰 Monthly Allowance
• 📍 Posting & Redeployment
• 🤝 CDS Groups
• 🎓 Discharge Certificate
• 📄 Exemption

What would you like to know today?

You're welcome! 😊 I'm glad I could help.

If you have any more questions about NYSC — whether it's about camp preparation, allowances, redeployment, or anything else — feel free to ask anytime!

🍀 Best of luck with your service year!

Goodbye! 👋 Best of luck with your NYSC journey!

Remember, you can always come back to ask more questions. 🇳🇬

The official NYSC portal is:

🌐 **portal.nysc.org.ng** — for registration, call-up letters, redeployment
🌐 **nysc.gov.ng** — official NYSC website for news and announcements

💡 Always use the official websites and be cautious of fake NYSC portals.
